applicationGuide.zh: 请查看学校官网了解详情。

desc.en: Japan's most prestigious university. PEAK program offers English-taught undergraduate degrees.
desc.zh: 日本最顶尖的大学，PEAK项目提供全英文本科学位。

climate.zh: 东京四季分明。夏季炎热潮湿（30-35°C），冬季寒冷干燥（2-8°C）。6-7月梅雨季。
climate.en: Tokyo has four distinct seasons. Summers hot and humid (30-35°C), winters cold and dry (2-8°C). Rainy season Jun-Jul.

housing.zh: 校内宿舍约￥3-5万/月（约$200-350），名额有限需提前申请。校外租房￥5-10万/月。
housing.en: On-campus dorms ¥30,000-50,000/month (~$200-350), limited spots—apply early. Off-campus ¥50,000-100,000/month.

employment.zh: 日本顶尖学府，毕业生就业率极高。大量毕业生进入日企、外资、科研机构。可获特定活动签证找工作。
employment.en: Japan's top university with very high employment rate. Graduates enter major Japanese firms, foreign companies, research institutions. Job-hunting visa available.

healthcare.zh: 日本国民健康保险，学生月缴约￥1500（约$10）。自付30%，校内有保健中心。
healthcare.en: Japan's National Health Insurance, students pay ~¥1500/month (~$10). 30% co-pay. Campus health center available.

application.zh: PEAK项目（英语授课）：通过学校官网申请。需SAT/ACT或IB成绩、TOEFL/IELTS、推荐信、个人陈述。
application.en: PEAK program (English-taught): apply via school website. SAT/ACT or IB scores, TOEFL/IELTS, recommendations, personal statement required.

safetyDetail.zh: 东京是全球最安全的大城市之一。犯罪率极低，夜间出行也很安全。校园安保严格。
safetyDetail.en: Tokyo is one of the world's safest major cities. Extremely low crime rate, safe even at night. Strict campus security.

deadline.zh: PEAK项目：11月（第一轮）/ 2月（第二轮）

applicationGuide.zh: 请查看学校官网了解详情。

desc.en: Japan's second university. Known for academic freedom and Nobel Prize winners. iUP English program.
desc.zh: 日本第二名校，以学术自由和诺贝尔奖得主闻名，iUP英文项目。

climate.zh: 京都盆地气候，夏季酷热潮湿（33-38°C），冬季寒冷（1-8°C）。春季樱花、秋季红叶闻名。
climate.en: Kyoto has a basin climate—very hot and humid summers (33-38°C), cold winters (1-8°C). Famous for cherry blossoms in spring and autumn foliage.

housing.zh: 校内宿舍约￥2.5-4.5万/月（约$170-300），名额有限。校外租房￥4-7万/月。

employment.zh: 日本顶尖研究型大学，学术界和企业界广泛认可。任天堂、京瓷等企业在京都。iUP项目英语授课。
employment.en: Japan's top research university recognized in academia and industry. Nintendo, Kyocera based in Kyoto. iUP program taught in English.

healthcare.zh: 日本国民健康保险，学生月缴约￥1500。自付30%。校内保健中心提供基础医疗。
healthcare.en: Japan's National Health Insurance, students ~¥1500/month. 30% co-pay. Campus health center provides basic care.

application.zh: iUP项目（英语授课）：通过学校官网申请。需学业成绩、英语证明、推荐信、面试。
application.en: iUP program (English-taught): apply via website. Academic records, English proficiency, recommendations, interview required.

safetyDetail.zh: 京都是日本最安全的城市之一，犯罪率极低。古都氛围，生活节奏舒适。
safetyDetail.en: Kyoto is one of Japan's safest cities with very low crime. Ancient capital atmosphere with comfortable pace of life.

deadline.zh: iUP项目：11月（第一轮）/ 2月（第二轮）

applicationGuide.zh: 请查看学校官网了解详情。

desc.en: A leading research university in Japan's second city. Strong in engineering and medicine.
desc.zh: 日本第二大城市的顶尖研究型大学，工程和医学实力强。

climate.zh: 大阪气候与京都类似，夏季炎热潮湿，冬季较温和。美食之都，生活成本低于东京。
climate.en: Osaka climate similar to Kyoto—hot humid summers, milder winters. Food capital of Japan, lower cost of living than Tokyo.

housing.zh: 校内宿舍约￥2-4万/月。大阪租房比东京便宜30-40%。
housing.en: On-campus dorms ~¥20,000-40,000/month. Osaka rents 30-40% cheaper than Tokyo.

employment.zh: 关西地区顶尖学府。松下、夏普等企业在大阪。医学、工学毕业生尤受欢迎。
employment.en: Kansai region's top university. Panasonic, Sharp based in Osaka. Medical and engineering graduates especially valued.

healthcare.zh: 日本NHI，学生约￥1500/月。大阪大学医学部附属医院提供优质医疗。
healthcare.en: Japan's NHI, students ~¥1500/month. Osaka University Hospital provides quality care.

application.zh: 通过学校官网申请英语授课项目。需学业成绩、英语证明、推荐信。
application.en: Apply for English-taught programs via website. Academic records, English proficiency, recommendations required.

safetyDetail.zh: 大阪整体安全友好。难波等繁华区注意扒手。校园安保良好。
safetyDetail.en: Osaka is generally safe and friendly. Watch for pickpockets in busy areas like Namba. Good campus security.

applicationGuide.zh: 请查看学校官网了解详情。

desc.en: First Japanese university to admit women and international students. Excellent materials science.
desc.zh: 日本第一所录取女性和留学生的大学，材料科学卓越。

climate.zh: 仙台气候四季分明。夏季温暖（22-28°C），冬季寒冷有雪（-1至5°C）。
climate.en: Sendai has four distinct seasons. Warm summers (22-28°C), cold snowy winters (-1 to 5°C).

housing.zh: 校内宿舍约￥1.5-3万/月。仙台生活成本比东京低30-40%。
housing.en: On-campus dorms ~¥15,000-30,000/month. Sendai cost of living 30-40% lower than Tokyo.

employment.zh: 日本旧帝大之一，材料科学和工学世界领先。东北地区大企业和研究所多。
employment.en: One of Japan's former Imperial universities, world-leading in materials science and engineering. Many companies and labs in Tohoku region.

healthcare.zh: 日本NHI，学生约￥1500/月。东北大学医院是区域顶级医院。
healthcare.en: Japan's NHI, students ~¥1500/month. Tohoku University Hospital is a top regional hospital.

application.zh: FGL项目（英语授课）：通过学校官网申请。

safetyDetail.zh: 仙台是安全的城市，号称'杜之都'。犯罪率低。
safetyDetail.en: Sendai is a safe city known as 'City of Trees'. Low crime rate.

applicationGuide.zh: 请查看学校官网了解详情。

desc.en: Japan's top science and technology university. Merged with Tokyo Medical & Dental in 2024.
desc.zh: 日本顶尖理工大学，2024年与东京医科齿科大学合并。

climate.en: Tokyo climate, same as University of Tokyo.

housing.zh: 校内宿舍约￥3-5万/月。大岡山校区位于东京南部住宅区。
housing.en: On-campus dorms ~¥30,000-50,000/month. Ookayama campus in southern Tokyo residential area.

employment.zh: 日本顶尖理工大学。索尼、丰田、日立等大量招聘。就业率极高。
employment.en: Japan's top tech university. Sony, Toyota, Hitachi actively recruit. Very high employment rate.

healthcare.zh: 日本NHI，学生约￥1500/月。校内保健中心。
healthcare.en: Japan's NHI, students ~¥1500/month. Campus health center.

application.zh: GSEP项目（英语授课）：通过学校官网申请。需数学/理科成绩、英语证明。
application.en: GSEP program (English-taught): apply via website. Math/science grades, English proficiency required.

safetyDetail.zh: 大岡山是安静安全的住宅区。东京整体安全。
safetyDetail.en: Ookayama is a quiet, safe residential area. Tokyo overall very safe.

applicationGuide.zh: 请查看学校官网了解详情。

desc.en: 6 Nobel laureates in physics and chemistry. G-30 English program available.
desc.zh: 6位诺贝尔物理/化学奖得主，提供G-30英语项目。

climate.zh: 名古屋夏季炎热潮湿（28-35°C），冬季较温和（1-8°C）。
climate.en: Nagoya has hot humid summers (28-35°C), relatively mild winters (1-8°C).

housing.zh: 校内宿舍约￥1.5-3万/月。名古屋生活成本低于东京。
housing.en: On-campus dorms ~¥15,000-30,000/month. Nagoya cost of living lower than Tokyo.

employment.zh: 丰田汽车总部所在地。汽车和制造业就业强势。G30项目英语授课。
employment.en: Home to Toyota Motor Corporation HQ. Strong automotive and manufacturing employment. G30 program English-taught.

healthcare.zh: 日本NHI。名古屋大学医院提供优质医疗。
healthcare.en: Japan's NHI. Nagoya University Hospital provides quality care.

application.zh: G30项目：通过学校官网申请。需学业成绩、英语证明。
application.en: G30 program: apply via website. Academic records, English proficiency required.

safetyDetail.zh: 名古屋是安全的大城市，犯罪率低于东京和大阪。
safetyDetail.en: Nagoya is a safe large city with lower crime rate than Tokyo and Osaka.

applicationGuide.zh: 请查看学校官网了解详情。

desc.en: Japan's top private university. Many English-taught programs. 7 Japanese PMs are alumni.
desc.zh: 日本顶尖私立大学，多个英文授课项目，7位日本首相的母校。

climate.en: Tokyo climate, same as University of Tokyo.

housing.zh: WISH国际宿舍等约￥5-8万/月。新宿区位置便利但租金较高。
housing.en: WISH international dorms ~¥50,000-80,000/month. Shinjuku location convenient but higher rent.

employment.zh: 日本顶级私立大学。政界、商界、新闻界校友网络极强。SILS项目英语授课。
employment.en: Japan's top private university. Extremely strong alumni network in politics, business, journalism. SILS program English-taught.

healthcare.zh: 日本NHI。早稻田有校内诊所和心理咨询。
healthcare.en: Japan's NHI. Waseda has campus clinic and counseling services.

application.zh: SILS/英语项目：通过学校官网申请。需SAT/IB、英语证明、推荐信。
application.en: SILS/English programs: apply via website. SAT/IB, English proficiency, recommendations required.

safetyDetail.zh: 早稻田校区位于新宿区，周边安全。东京整体犯罪率极低。
safetyDetail.en: Waseda campus in Shinjuku ward, safe surroundings. Tokyo overall has very low crime rate.

deadline.zh: SILS项目：9月（春季入学）/ 4月（秋季入学）

applicationGuide.zh: 请查看学校官网了解详情。

desc.en: Japan's oldest private university (1858). PEARL English program. Strong business alumni network.
desc.zh: 日本最古老的私立大学（1858年），PEARL英文项目，商界校友网络强大。

climate.zh: 东京气候，同东京大学。横滨校区更近海、气候稍温和。
climate.en: Tokyo climate, same as UTokyo. Yokohama campus is coastal and slightly milder.

housing.zh: 校内宿舍约￥4-7万/月。三田校区在东京市中心，日吉/SFC在横滨。
housing.en: On-campus dorms ~¥40,000-70,000/month. Mita campus in central Tokyo, Hiyoshi/SFC in Yokohama.

employment.zh: 日本顶级私立大学，商界校友网络极强。三菱、三井等财阀企业大量招聘庆应毕业生。PEARL项目英语授课。
employment.en: Japan's top private university with extremely strong business alumni. Mitsubishi, Mitsui actively recruit Keio graduates. PEARL program English-taught.

healthcare.zh: 日本NHI。庆应义塾大学医院是日本顶级医院。
healthcare.en: Japan's NHI. Keio University Hospital is one of Japan's top hospitals.

application.zh: PEARL项目：通过学校官网申请。需SAT/IB、英语证明、推荐信、面试。
application.en: PEARL program: apply via website. SAT/IB, English proficiency, recommendations, interview required.

safetyDetail.zh: 三田和日吉校区都位于安全的城市区域。
safetyDetail.en: Both Mita and Hiyoshi campuses in safe urban areas.

applicationGuide.zh: 请查看学校官网了解详情。

desc.en: A leading university in southern Japan. English-taught programs through JTW and IUPE.
desc.zh: 日本南部顶尖大学，通过JTW和IUPE提供英语授课项目。

climate.zh: 福冈亚热带气候。夏季炎热（27-33°C），冬季温和（3-10°C）。日本最宜居城市之一。
climate.en: Fukuoka subtropical climate. Hot summers (27-33°C), mild winters (3-10°C). One of Japan's most livable cities.

housing.zh: 校内宿舍约￥1.5-3万/月。福冈生活成本全日本最低之一。
housing.en: On-campus dorms ~¥15,000-30,000/month. Fukuoka has one of the lowest costs of living in Japan.

employment.zh: 九州地区顶尖学府。福冈是亚洲门户城市，IT和创业活跃。
employment.en: Kyushu region's top university. Fukuoka is Asia's gateway city with active IT and startup scene.

healthcare.zh: 日本NHI。九州大学医院是区域顶级医院。
healthcare.en: Japan's NHI. Kyushu University Hospital is a top regional hospital.

application.zh: 英语项目通过学校官网申请。

safetyDetail.zh: 福冈是安全友好的城市，多次被评为日本最宜居城市。
safetyDetail.en: Fukuoka is safe and friendly, repeatedly ranked as Japan's most livable city.

applicationGuide.zh: 请查看学校官网了解详情。

desc.en: Beautiful campus in Sapporo. Strong in agriculture, veterinary science, and environmental studies.
desc.zh: 札幌美丽校园，农学、兽医和环境研究实力强。

climate.zh: 札幌冬季漫长多雪（-4至1°C），夏季凉爽宜人（18-26°C）。滑雪胜地。
climate.en: Sapporo has long snowy winters (-4 to 1°C), cool pleasant summers (18-26°C). Skiing paradise.

housing.zh: 校内宿舍约￥1-2.5万/月。札幌生活成本非常低。
housing.en: On-campus dorms ~¥10,000-25,000/month. Sapporo has very low cost of living.

employment.zh: 北海道地区唯一的旧帝大。农学、环境科学领先。札幌是北海道经济中心。
employment.en: Hokkaido's only former Imperial university. Leading in agriculture and environmental science. Sapporo is Hokkaido's economic center.

healthcare.zh: 日本NHI。北海道大学医院是北海道最大医院。
healthcare.en: Japan's NHI. Hokkaido University Hospital is Hokkaido's largest hospital.

application.zh: Modern Japanese Studies Program等英语项目通过官网申请。
application.en: Modern Japanese Studies Program and other English programs: apply via website.

safetyDetail.zh: 札幌是安全的城市。冬季路面结冰需注意防滑。
safetyDetail.en: Sapporo is a safe city. Watch for icy roads in winter.
